item.title: End-to-end CDC support
item.description: We're excited to announce end-to-end content-defined chunking (CDC) support for Bazel remote caching in BuildBuddy.

item.title: Run log streaming
item.description: In addition to build logs, you can now use the bb CLI to stream bazel run executable output to our servers and view live-updating run logs from the UI.

item.title: BuildBuddy MCP server
item.description: BuildBuddy now exposes an MCP endpoint for coding agents and other

item.title: Improved handling of short-lived secrets in remote execution
item.description: BuildBuddy has supported passing short-lived secrets to remote actions via the env-overrides platform property, which redacts values from action cache entries. The new secret-env-overrides and secret-env-overrides-base64 properties extend this protection by also redacting values from workflow logs.

item.title: Improved GPU and device support for self-hosted executors
item.description: GPU support for self-hosted Linux executors is now easier to set up.

item.title: Changelog
item.description: We're excited to introduce the BuildBuddy Changelog!

item.title: Dark mode
item.description: We're excited to announce dark mode for our UI.

item.title: bb explain: understand why your build re-ran actions
item.description: bb explain shows a structural diff of two compact execution logs. It helps answer the common questions: "Why did Bazel re-execute that action?" and "What changed between these builds?"

item.title: Drilldowns: find similarities between slow or failing builds
item.description: The drilldown view displays heatmaps of build and execution metrics over time. It can help isolate why a subset of builds is slower or failing more often.

item.title: Compare invocations: compare two builds side-by-side
item.description: The compare invocations view allows you to diff two invocations side-by-side.

item.title: Compare actions: compare two actions side-by-side
item.description: The compare actions view allows you to diff two actions side-by-side.
